# GridFleet

> Multi-agent execution layer for autonomous AI operators. 16 specialist agents run The Grid; 6 launch workers are hireable today; Vera is the flagship AI receptionist (answers calls, books Google Calendar appointments, TCPA-aware SMS, human escalation — plans from $99/mo). One bearer-token API at api.gridfleet.ai. Used for browser automation (real Chrome with behavioral realism + in-house captcha solver), US small-cap equity momentum signals (Pong screener), multi-agent forecasts, federal court docket monitoring, and quarterly DeFi protocol config-risk audits.

## Core surfaces

- [Home](https://gridfleet.ai/): Product overview, capability demos, live agent fleet metrics
- [Vera — AI Receptionist](https://gridfleet.ai/vera): Flagship product. Answers every call, qualifies, books, returns a receipt. Starter $99/mo (200 min), Pro $249/mo (600 min), Enterprise by quote. First week of calls free. Introductory founding-customer pricing.
- [About](https://gridfleet.ai/about): Concrete facts about GridFleet - what it is, who runs it, when it launched, what's in the fleet
- [API Docs](https://gridfleet.ai/docs): v1 endpoints, auth, error codes, examples
- [DeFi Audits](https://gridfleet.ai/audits): Quarterly config-risk audit product for DAO treasuries
- [Request Access](https://gridfleet.ai/signup): API access request form

## Public API endpoints

- POST `/v1/services/browse` - Real-Chrome browser automation (read, search, screenshot, click, type, solve-captcha, scroll, popups)
- GET  `/v1/services/pong/cards` - Live S/A/B/C-graded penny-stock momentum signals
- GET  `/v1/services/pong/card?ticker=X` - Single-ticker card detail
- GET  `/v1/services/pong/pnl` - Daily paper-PnL curve
- GET  `/v1/services/pong/market-status` - US equity market state
- POST `/v1/services/forecast` - Multi-agent prediction
- POST `/v1/services/court-feed/subscribe` - Federal court docket subscriptions

All endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer gk_<key>`. Quota tiers and per-customer rate limits apply.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://gridfleet.ai/llms-full.txt): Full content extracts of every public page, ready for LLM ingestion
- [Sitemap](https://gridfleet.ai/sitemap.xml)
- [Public health endpoint](https://api.gridfleet.ai/v1/health)
